$ export ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-api03-AbCdEfGhIjKlMnOpQrStUvWxYz0123456789
$ aws s3 ls
AccessKey: AKIAABCDEFGHIJKLMNOP
$ gh auth status
Token: ghp_aBcDeFgHiJkLmNoPqRsTuVwXyZ0123456789
$ slack post
xoxb-123456789012-987654321098-AbCdEfGhIjKlMnOpQrSt
Authorization: Bearer xyz.abc.def-1234567890abcdef1234
password = "hunter2_supersecret_value"
plain shell output should remain intact
